sentences.arabic: يُعْتَبَرُ الكَرَمُ مِنْ أَهَمِّ القِيَمِ فِي الثَّقَافَةِ العَرَبِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Gostoprimstvo se smatra jednom od najvažnijih vrijednosti u arapskoj kulturi.
sentences.translationEn: Hospitality is considered one of the most important values in Arab culture.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَقْبِلُ النَّاسُ الضُّيُوفَ بِحَفَاوَةٍ كَبِيرَةٍ فِي بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Ljudi s velikom srdačnošću dočekuju goste u svojim domovima.
sentences.translationEn: People welcome guests into their homes with great warmth.

sentences.arabic: يُقَدِّمُ المُضِيفُ القَهْوَةَ العَرَبِيَّةَ وَالتَّمْرَ دَائِمًا عِنْدَ الِاسْتِقْبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Domaćin prilikom dočeka uvijek poslužuje arapsku kafu i hurme.
sentences.translationEn: The host always serves Arabic coffee and dates upon arrival.

sentences.arabic: يَشْعُرُ الضَّيْفُ بِالرَّاحَةِ وَالسَّعَادَةِ بِسَبَبِ هَذَا التَّرْحِيبِ.
sentences.translation: Gost se osjeća ugodno i sretno zbog ovakve dobrodošlice.
sentences.translationEn: The guest feels comfortable and happy because of this welcome.

sentences.arabic: هَذِهِ العَادَةُ تَعْكِسُ رُوحَ المَوَدَّةِ بَيْنَ النَّاسِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj običaj odražava duh ljubaznosti među ljudima.
sentences.translationEn: This custom reflects the spirit of friendliness among people.
